mapper.select: SELECT id, exam_id, student_id, start_time, submit_time, answers, total_score, status, created_time, updated_time FROM exam_submission WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT es.id, e.exam_title as examTitle, e.exam_type, e.course_id, es.exam_id, es.student_id, es.start_time, es.submit_time, es.answers, es.total_score, es.status, es.created_time FROM exam_submission es LEFT JOIN exam e ON es.exam_id = e.id WHERE es.id = #{submissionId}

SELECT es.id, e.exam_title AS examTitle, e.exam_type, e.course_id, es.exam_id, es.student_id, es.start_time, es.submit_time, es.answers, es.total_score, es.status, es.created_time FROM exam_submission es INNER JOIN exam e ON es.exam_id = e.id WHERE es.id = #{submissionId} AND e.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT id, exam_id, student_id, start_time, submit_time, answers, total_score, status, created_time, updated_time FROM exam_submission WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND status IN ('GRADED', 'AUTO_GRADED', 'MANUAL_GRADED')

SELECT e.id AS examId, e.exam_title AS examTitle, CASE WHEN latest_es.status IS NOT NULL THEN latest_es.status ELSE 'NOT_PARTICIPATED' END AS status, latest_es.total_score AS score FROM exam e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.id, es.exam_id, es.status, es.total_score FROM exam_submission es INNER JOIN ( SELECT exam_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM exam_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY exam_id ) latest ON es.id = latest.max_id ) latest_es ON e.id = latest_es.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND (e.status = 'PUBLISHED' OR e.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' OR e.status = 'ENDED') ORDER BY e.start_time DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT e.id AS examId, e.exam_title AS examTitle, CASE WHEN latest_es.status IS NOT NULL THEN latest_es.status ELSE 'NOT_PARTICIPATED' END AS status, latest_es.total_score AS score, latest_es.submit_time AS submitTime FROM exam e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.id, es.exam_id, es.status, es.total_score, es.submit_time FROM exam_submission es INNER JOIN ( SELECT exam_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM exam_submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY exam_id ) latest ON es.id = latest.max_id ) latest_es ON e.id = latest_es.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY e.start_time DESC, e.id DESC

SELECT e.id AS examId, e.exam_title AS examTitle, COALESCE(AVG(es.total_score), 0) AS averageScore FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_submission es ON es.exam_id = e.id AND es.status IN ('GRADED', 'AUTO_GRADED', 'MANUAL_GRADED') WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY e.id, e.exam_title ORDER BY e.start_time ASC, e.id ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN es.total_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN es.total_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN es.total_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN es.total_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '0-59' END AS scoreRange, COUNT(1) AS count FROM exam_submission es INNER JOIN exam e ON e.id = es.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND es.status IN ('GRADED', 'AUTO_GRADED', 'MANUAL_GRADED') AND es.total_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN es.total_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN es.total_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN es.total_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN es.total_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '0-59' END

SELECT es.id, es.exam_id, es.student_id, es.start_time, es.submit_time, es.answers, es.total_score, es.status, es.created_time, es.updated_time FROM exam_submission es INNER JOIN exam e ON e.id = es.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND es.status IN ('GRADED', 'AUTO_GRADED', 'MANUAL_GRADED')

SELECT e.id AS examId, e.exam_title AS examTitle, eq.id AS questionId, eq.question_type AS questionType, eq.question_content AS questionContent, eq.correct_answer AS correctAnswer FROM exam_question eq INNER JOIN exam e ON e.id = eq.exam_id WHERE e.course_id = #{courseId} AND eq.question_type IN ('SINGLE_CHOICE', 'MULTI_CHOICE', 'TRUE_FALSE', 'FILL_BLANK') ORDER BY e.start_time ASC, e.id ASC, eq.sort_order ASC, eq.id ASC
